settings.heading: Terms of Service
settings.intro: Welcome to ELARÉ! By visiting our website, placing an order, or interacting with our brand, you agree to the following terms and conditions. These terms are designed to ensure transparency, mutual respect, and a smooth experience for both of us — because your trust means everything.

settings.title: 1. Overview
settings.body: ELARÉ is owned and operated under ELARÉ Enterprises. These terms apply to all users of our website, including browsers, customers, and contributors of content. We kindly ask that you read them carefully before engaging with our site or making a purchase.

settings.title: 2. Products & Services
settings.body:
We aim to provide high-quality, skin-loving products rooted in natural, halal, and blessed ingredients. While we take every step to ensure our products perform as described, skincare results may vary due to individual skin types and conditions.

For best results, follow product instructions and perform a patch test prior to full use.

settings.title: 3. Pricing & Availability
settings.body: All prices are listed in Pakistani Rupees (PKR) and are subject to change without notice. We reserve the right to update or discontinue products without prior notice. In case a product is unavailable after you place an order, we will contact you promptly with options.

settings.title: 4. Order Confirmation
settings.body: Once your order is placed, you will receive a confirmation email or message. This is not a binding acceptance but a confirmation that we have received your request. Acceptance is finalized once your order is dispatched.

settings.title: 5. Payment
settings.body: We currently accept various forms of payment including bank transfers, mobile wallets, and cash on delivery (COD). All payments must be completed and verified before shipment is processed.

settings.title: 6. Delivery
settings.body: Orders are delivered throughout Pakistan via trusted courier partners. Estimated delivery times range between 2–7 business days. Delays due to weather, political unrest, or other unforeseen issues are not within our control, but we'll do our best to update you at every step.

settings.title: 7. Returns & Refunds
settings.body: We stand by the quality of our products. If you're not satisfied, please refer to our Return & Refund Policy for detailed instructions. We offer returns for unused and unopened products, and consider returns on used items in case of genuine concerns.

settings.title: 8. Intellectual Property
settings.body: All content on this website — including text, visuals, logos, packaging design, and product names — is the intellectual property of ELARÉ. Use of our content without permission is not allowed.

settings.title: 9. User Conduct
settings.body: We expect respectful behavior from all site visitors. Any misuse of our website, including fraudulent activity, spam, or harmful actions, may result in a ban or legal action.

settings.title: 10. Third-Party Tools & Links
settings.body: Our site may contain third-party tools, tracking software (e.g., Google Analytics), or links that help us improve user experience. We are not responsible for any third-party content, practices, or privacy policies once you leave our site.

settings.title: 11. Limitation of Liability
settings.body: ELARÉ is not liable for any allergic reactions, misuse of products, or indirect damages arising from the use of our products or website. Always consult with a dermatologist if unsure about any skincare product.

settings.title: 12. Changes to Terms
settings.body: We reserve the right to update these Terms & Conditions at any time. The latest version will always be available here and will include the date of the most recent update.

settings.title: Your Trust, Our Promise
settings.body: We're here not just to sell skincare, but to build lasting trust. If you ever feel confused or concerned about anything in these terms, don't hesitate to reach out.
settings.footer_note: Let's walk this skincare journey together — with care, clarity, and connection.
